---
pagetitle: "Atlas"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<style>

#quarto-content > * {
  padding-top: 0px;
}

#quarto-content.page-navbar {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: calc(100vh - 163px); /* explicit height, not min-height */
}

</style>
```

<div class="atlas-layout">

<div class="atlas-map">

```{r map}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(mapgl)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(readr)
library(here)
library(htmlwidgets)

metadata_path <- here::here("data", "metadata.csv")

photos <- read_csv(metadata_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  filter(!is.na(GPSLatitude), !is.na(GPSLongitude)) |>
  mutate(GPSLongitude = if_else(GPSLongitudeRef == "W", GPSLongitude * -1, GPSLongitude),
         GPSLatitude = if_else(GPSLatitudeRef == "S", GPSLatitude * -1, GPSLatitude)
         ) |>
  select(CollectionName, DateTimeOriginal, LocationShownSublocation,
         GPSLongitude, GPSLatitude) |>
  # Should not be hardcoded longterm
  mutate(Year = 1966,
         CollectionURL = "../collections/discovery-bay-1966",
         ThumbnailURL = "../collections/discovery-bay-1966/img/db037.webp",
         n = length(CollectionName)) |>
  distinct()

photos_sf <- st_as_sf(
  photos[1, ],
  coords = c("GPSLongitude", "GPSLatitude"),
  crs = 4326
)

photos_sf <- photos_sf |>
  mutate(
    popup_html = paste0(
      '<div style="font-family:Georgia,serif;min-width:180px;">',
      '<span style="font-family:monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#2A7F7F;">',
      Year,
      '</span>',
      '<p style="margin:0.25rem 0 0.1rem;font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;color:#0D1B2A;">',
      ifelse(
        !is.na(CollectionURL),
        paste0(
          '<a href="',
          CollectionURL,
          '" target="_blank" style="color:#2A7F7F;">',
          CollectionName,
          '</a>'
        ),
        CollectionName
      ),
      '</p>',
      '<p style="margin:0;font-size:0.8rem;color:#5a6a7a;font-style:italic;">',
      ifelse(!is.na(LocationShownSublocation), paste0("Location: ", LocationShownSublocation), ""),
      "\n\n",
      ifelse(!is.na(n), paste0("Number of images: ", n), ""),
      '</p>',
      ifelse(
        !is.na(ThumbnailURL) & nchar(ThumbnailURL) > 0,
        {
          img_tag <- paste0(
            '<img src="',
            ThumbnailURL,
            '" style="width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/3;object-fit:cover;display:block;margin-top:0.5rem;">'
          )
          if (!is.na(CollectionURL)) {
            paste0(
              '<a href="', CollectionURL, '" target="_blank">',
              img_tag,
              '</a>'
            )
          } else {
            img_tag
          }
        },
        ""
      ),
      '</div>'
    )
  )

m <- maplibre(
  style = carto_style("positron"),
  projection = "mercator",
  center = c(-77.4, 18.2),
  zoom = 2,
  width = "100%",
  height = "85vh"
)

m <- m |>
  add_navigation_control(position = "top-left") |>
  
  add_source(
    id = "photos",
    data = photos_sf,
    cluster = TRUE,
    cluster_max_zoom = 14,
    cluster_radius = 50
  ) |>
  
  add_circle_layer(
    id = "clusters",
    source = photos_sf,
    filter = list("has", "point_count"),
    circle_color = "#2A7F7F",
    circle_opacity = 1
  ) |>
  
  add_symbol_layer(
    id = "cluster-count",
    source = photos_sf,
    filter = list("has", "point_count"),
    text_field = list("get", "point_count_abbreviated"),
    text_color = "#ffffff",
    text_size = 13
  ) |>
  
  add_circle_layer(
    id = "unclustered",
    source = photos_sf,
    filter = list("!", list("has", "point_count")),
    circle_color = "#2A7F7F",
    circle_radius = 6,
    circle_opacity = 0.7,
    circle_stroke_width = 1.5,
    circle_stroke_color = "#2A7F7F"
  ) |>
  
  onRender(
    "
    function(el, x) {

      function attachHandler() {

        const map =
          el._map ||
          el.map ||
          (window.maplibregl && el.__map);

        if (!map) {
          setTimeout(attachHandler, 500);
          return;
        }

        map.on('click', 'unclustered', function(e) {

          if (!e.features || !e.features.length) return;

          const props = e.features[0].properties;

          document.getElementById('photo-sidebar-content').innerHTML =
            props.popup_html;

          document.querySelector('.photo-sidebar').classList.add('visible');
        });

        map.on('mouseenter', 'unclustered', function() {
          map.getCanvas().style.cursor = 'pointer';
        });

        map.on('mouseleave', 'unclustered', function() {
          map.getCanvas().style.cursor = '';
        });
      }

      attachHandler();
    }
    "
  )

m
```

</div>

<aside class="photo-sidebar">

<div class="photo-sidebar-header">
<button class="photo-sidebar-close" onclick="closePhotoSidebar()">✕</button>
</div>

<div id="photo-sidebar-content">Click a point to view details.</div>

</aside>

</div>

```{=html}
<script>
function closePhotoSidebar() {
  document.querySelector('.photo-sidebar').classList.remove('visible');
  document.getElementById('photo-sidebar-content').innerHTML = 'Click a point to view details.';
}
</script>
```
